editor_settings.title: RTX 4090 Unboxing: Why People Still Want This GPU in 2026
editor_settings.content:
RTX 4090 Unboxing: Why People Still Want This GPU in 2026

The RTX 4090 still makes people stop scrolling.

Even now, a simple unboxing clip can make the card feel like the final boss of PC upgrades.

But hype is not a buying strategy, so let’s separate the feeling from the real value.

The Clip Is Simple, But It Works

This TikTok does not over-explain anything. It is just an RTX 4090 unboxing, and honestly, that is enough for this kind of product.

@gamingpchome RTX 4090 Unboxing! #rtx4090 ♬ original sound - Gaming PC Home

The RTX 4090 has visual weight. Big box, big cooler, big promise.

That is why the card still pulls attention in 2026.

Why The RTX 4090 Still Feels Special

NVIDIA positioned the RTX 4090 as the flagship of the Ada Lovelace generation, with 24GB of GDDR6X memory and serious 4K performance.

That memory is the reason it aged better than normal gaming cards.

For games, 24GB gives breathing room. For creators, it helps with large timelines, renders, and effects. For local AI, it can be the difference between “works” and “out of memory.”

Who Should Still Buy An RTX 4090?

Buy it if you need:

  • 4K gaming with high settings
  • ray tracing without constantly lowering settings
  • 24GB VRAM for AI or creator work
  • a high-end card at a real discount

Skip it if you only play 1080p games, esports titles, or lighter games. That is too much GPU for the job.

The Used Market Is Tricky

The RTX 4090 is desirable, and desirable GPUs attract messy listings.

Before buying used, check:

  • seller history
  • real photos
  • power connector condition
  • warranty status
  • return policy
  • whether it was used for heavy mining or 24/7 workloads

A cheap RTX 4090 is exciting. A suspicious RTX 4090 is expensive trouble.

Should You Buy RTX 4090 Or RTX 5090?

If RTX 4090 is much cheaper, it can still be a smart high-end buy.

If RTX 4090 is close to RTX 5090 pricing, I would rather compare newer options first. The 5090 brings 32GB GDDR7 on NVIDIA’s current flagship page, and it makes the old flagship less automatic.

[product-card:asus-tuf-gaming-oc-geforce-rtx-5090-32gb-graphics-card-32gb-gddr7-pcie-50-21760-cuda-cores-8k-support-triple-fan-cooling]


Final Verdict

The RTX 4090 still deserves the attention it gets.

It is not old in the normal sense. It is still fast, still useful, and still overkill for most people.

Buy it if the price is right and you can use the 24GB memory. Skip it if the seller is asking new-flagship money for yesterday’s flagship.

Sources Checked

  • NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4090 official page
  • NVIDIA GeForce RTX 5090 official page
  • ASUS ROG Strix RTX 4090 specs
  • Gigabyte AORUS RTX 4090 Master product page
